all_systems.title: Confirm all systems are running — teleporter network active, Create SU online, farms passive, Chorus fuel supply

the_record.title: Write a final Book and Quill record — document what you built, what it cost, and what it was for

subtitle.text: This is not the end. The questbook ends. The world continues. Write down what you built. Leave the record behind.

description: CH.17 · THE FINAL BUILD
▸ The questbook ends here.',
Not the world.',
The questbook is a guide through the first 17 chapters.',
The world continues after the guide ends.',
What you do after this page',
is not written by anyone.',
That is the point.',
◈ WHAT YOU BUILT
└ Ch01-05: survival systems, early tools, first companions',
└ Ch06-08: Create automation, oil chain, ISS magic foundation',
└ Ch09: End portal, 12 eye chain, dragon preparation',
└ Ch10: nuclear age, Create Teleporters prep, quantum chain start',
└ Ch11: Cataclysm chain complete, Emulator gear, Nether cleared',
└ Ch12: kingdom foundation, Wither Storm, Scarlet King, Manifestor',
└ Ch13-14: End cleared, farmed, mapped — void is supply chain now',
└ Ch15-16: homecoming, Celestial Netherite, music hall, wine cellar',
└ Ch17: teleporter network, quantum age, archmage, nuclear test',
◈ SYSTEMS CHECK
└ Create SU network: main factory running at sufficient SU',
└ Quantum Fluid pipeline: Chorus farm → Mixer → Teleporter tanks',
└ Passive farms: Enderman (pearls), Chorus (fruit), Shulker (shells)',
└ Food supply: seasonal farm + End kitchen + Vinery cellar',
└ Lifesteal: 20 hearts + Revive Crystal in Ender Chest',
└ Nuclear: Steel Reactor running + 4 shells in storage',
└ Companions: Dracolotl + Baby Trigon at base',
└ Documentation: Atlas filled + photographs taken + journals written',
◈ THE RECORD
└ Write a final Book and Quill entry — what the run was',
└ Include: what you built, what was hardest, what surprised you',
└ Place it in an item frame in your base',
(or in a Bookshelf: vanilla bookshelves are storage too)',
└ This is the record the previous civilizations did not leave.',
You are leaving it.',
Someone will come after you.',
This is what they will find.',
▸ Frieren returned to Himmel's grave after 80 years.',
She cried.',
She had not cried at the funeral.',
She needed 80 years to understand what she had lost.',
You do not have 80 years.',
But you have the journal.',
Write it before the understanding fades.',
The next Sinborn player will thank you for it.',
▶ Confirm all systems are running [check]
▶ Write the final Book and Quill record [check]
◇ The questbook is complete.',
The world is not.',
There are no more gates.',
There are no more chapters.',
There is only the world you built',
and what you choose to do with it',
now that no one is telling you what to do next.
That is the actual ending.
You made it.
